description: CompositionBlue printed sleeveless top made of woven 100% cotton, has a round neck, knitted panel at top with a buttoned placket up to the midriff, flaring pin-tucks from the bust and back yoke, a flared skirt and ruffle detailing along the hemlineFitRegularWash careRinse separatelyGentle handwash in mild detergentDo not bleach or scrub on embroidery & printLine dry inside outLow ironThe crush-worthy, mood lifting colouring with updated design details in this tunic top, fresh from sepia's design studio, is the season's summer essential. Style this with form fitting jeggings and ballet flats for a sweet, girly vibe. For a vintage feel, throw on a faded and worn denim jacket, tights and a floral scarf with this piece. Model statisticsThe product is a size M on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
